game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **レッドホーン家の探偵 (Redhorn Family Detective):** Redhorn Family Detective is a narrative-driven point-and-click adventure game where players guide Edward, a young detective, through a small town to solve a serial murder case. Players interact with the environment by tapping on objects to examine them, collecting clues, and initiating dialogue with suspects and witnesses from a dedicated UI menu. Progression unfolds linearly across multiple chapters, requiring players to combine collected evidence in their inventory and make logical deductions to unlock new locations, advance the story, and uncover Redhorn family secrets. The difficulty scales with the complexity of the deduction puzzles, which might involve connecting 3-5 disparate clues to form a coherent theory. The primary objective is to successfully solve the overarching murder mystery, leading to a conclusive narrative ending, with potential for multiple endings based on key deductions.
game_info.description: Guide Edward, a young detective, through a murder mystery in a small town. Examine objects, collect clues, and interview suspects to solve the case. Combine evidence to make deductions that unlock new locations and advance the story. Connect disparate clues to uncover the truth behind the Redhorn family secrets and bring the killer to justice.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between locations and menu options
Space: Interact with objects, select menu items, advance dialogue
Z: Open/close inventory and deduction menu
Shift: Skip dialogue text
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart game

TEST_1.test_description: Basic navigation and interaction test. Validates that the player can move between locations, interact with objects, and collect clues. Tests the fundamental mechanics of the point-and-click adventure gameplay.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through available locations using arrow keys. Interact with highlighted objects using Space. Collect at least 3 clues by examining different objects. Verify that clues are added to inventory and the game state updates correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully navigate to multiple locations, interact with objects, and collect clues. Inventory should contain collected clues. No errors or stuck states. Game remains responsive to inputs throughout the test.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test that plays through the entire game optimally. Tests the complete narrative flow, all deduction puzzles, and verifies the win condition is achievable. This validates the entire game loop from start to finish.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Follow the optimal path through the mystery: collect all necessary clues in each chapter, make correct deductions by combining evidence, interview all suspects, and solve each puzzle in sequence. Navigate efficiently between locations and use deduction menu to progress the story.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Complete all chapters and reach GAME_OVER_WIN state. All deductions are solved correctly, the killer is identified, and the final narrative conclusion is reached. Game state shows victory condition with appropriate win message.

TEST_3.test_description: Dialogue and suspect interview test. Validates that the dialogue system works correctly, suspects can be interviewed, and information is properly conveyed to the player. Tests narrative progression through conversations.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Navigate to locations with suspects. Open dialogue menu and cycle through all dialogue options with each character. Verify that dialogue advances correctly and new information is revealed as the story progresses.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: All dialogue trees are accessible and functional. Suspects provide relevant information. Dialogue advances appropriately and doesn't get stuck. Story information is properly conveyed through conversations.
TEST_3.description: Dialogue and suspect interview test. Validates that the dialogue system works correctly, suspects can be interviewed, and information is properly conveyed to the player. Tests narrative progression through conversations.

TEST_4.test_description: Deduction puzzle test. Validates that the deduction system correctly combines clues and unlocks story progression. Tests the core puzzle-solving mechanic that drives the narrative forward.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Collect required clues for a deduction puzzle. Open deduction menu using Z. Select correct combination of clues to form a deduction. Verify that successful deductions unlock new content and progress the chapter.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Deduction puzzles can be completed by combining correct clues. Successful deductions unlock new locations or advance chapters. Invalid combinations are rejected with appropriate feedback. Game progression gates work correctly.
TEST_4.description: Deduction puzzle test. Validates that the deduction system correctly combines clues and unlocks story progression. Tests the core puzzle-solving mechanic that drives the narrative forward.

TEST_4.expected: Deduction puzzles can be completed by combining correct clues. Successful deductions unlock new locations or advance chapters. Invalid combinations are rejected with appropriate feedback. Game progression gates work correctly.

TEST_5.test_description: Chapter progression and location unlock test. Validates that chapters progress in correct order and new locations unlock based on story events. Tests the linear narrative structure and gating mechanics.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Complete objectives in Chapter 1 to unlock Chapter 2. Verify that locked locations become accessible after meeting requirements. Check that story events trigger chapter transitions correctly.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Chapters progress sequentially. Locations unlock at appropriate story beats. No premature access to gated content. Chapter transitions are smooth and story maintains coherence throughout progression.
